name: Garden Resort & Spa - Premium Escape
summary: Experience the ultimate luxury at Garden Resort & Spa in Punta Cana. Enjoy pristine beaches, world-class amenities, and all-inclusive packages in this tropical paradise. Perfect for couples and families seeking relaxation and adventure.
accommodation: Luxurious 5-star resort rooms with ocean views and direct beach access. All rooms feature private balconies, king-size beds, premium amenities, butler service, and complimentary mini-bar. Junior suites available with hot tubs.
hotelDescription: A stunning beachfront property featuring 5 outdoor pools (including adults-only infinity pool), multiple gourmet restaurants, a world-renowned 20,000 sqm spa, and nightly entertainment on the shores of Punta Cana. All-inclusive with premium beverages.

customDetails.Pool: 5 outdoor pools including adults-only infinity pool with swim-up bar
customDetails.Beach: Private beach with water sports including kayaking, snorkeling, and windsurfing
customDetails.Entertainment: Nightly shows, live music, casino, and nightclub
customDetails.Spa: Full-service spa with 30+ treatment options and wellness center
customDetails.Dining: 6 specialty restaurants - Italian, Japanese, French, Caribbean, Steakhouse, Mediterranean
customDetails.Activities: Tennis, volleyball, basketball, fitness center, yoga classes
customDetails.Kids: Kids club with activities for ages 3-12, babysitting service available

name: Dolomites: 7-day guided hike
summary: Experience the excitement of 7 days among the wonders of the Brenta Dolomites! Unforgettable excursions, breathtaking views, 7 days of adventure in a paradise.
accommodation: During your hike in Dolomites, you will be accommodated in mountain huts. The tour package includes stays in shared dormitory-style rooms.

name: Caribbean Dream Cruise
summary: Sail the turquoise Caribbean waters visiting multiple islands. Experience luxury at sea with stops in Jamaica, Grand Cayman, and Cozumel, Mexico.
accommodation: Modern cabin on a luxury cruise ship. Options range from interior cabin to ocean-view suite with private balcony.
hotelDescription: A state-of-the-art cruise ship with 15 decks, multiple restaurants, pools, spa, casino, and entertainment venues. Capacity for 3,500 guests.

name: Tropical Caribe Hotel
summary: A hidden gem on the untouched shores of Barahona. Experience authentic Dominican culture with modern comforts in this intimate boutique resort.
accommodation: Boutique rooms and bungalows with garden or sea views. All rooms include air conditioning, WiFi, and private bathroom.
hotelDescription: An intimate boutique hotel with 45 rooms nestled between the mountains and the Caribbean Sea. Features a restaurant, bar, and private beach area.

customDetails.Local excursions: Whale watching, Laguna Oviedo, Los Patos beach
customDetails.Transport: Airport shuttle from Santo Domingo included

name: Machu Picchu Trek - Legendary Journey
summary: Trek through the legendary Inca Trail and discover the ancient citadel of Machu Picchu. A journey through breathtaking Andean landscapes, cloud forests, and Inca ruins with expert historical guides.
accommodation: Combination of 3-season camping tents along the Inca Trail and a 4-star hotel in Aguas Calientes. All camping equipment provided including sleeping bags and sleeping pads. Hot meals at camp.

customDetails.Tourguide: Expert guides fluent in English and Spanish with historical specialization
customDetails.Permits: Inca Trail permits and Machu Picchu entry included
customDetails.Porters: Professional porters carry camp equipment (personal bags max 5kg extra charge)
customDetails.Altitude: Up to 4,215m - 2-day acclimatization in Cusco included
customDetails.Transportation: Round-trip train from Aguas Calientes to Machu Picchu
customDetails.Fitness: Moderate to challenging fitness level required
customDetails.Highlights: Dead Woman's Pass, Runkurakay ruins, Sun Gate sunrise at Machu Picchu

name: Mediterranean Cruise Experience
summary: Sail the historic Mediterranean visiting Rome, Athens, Santorini, and Barcelona. A perfect blend of ancient history, stunning architecture, and vibrant Mediterranean culture.
accommodation: Elegant staterooms on a premium cruise liner. Ocean-view and balcony options available.
hotelDescription: A premium mid-size cruise ship with 12 decks, 4 restaurants, 3 pools, spa, and enrichment programs including history lectures by expert guides.

customDetails.Shore excursions: Optional guided tours at each port
